provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Traffic (Bukene Minor Settlement) (Speed Limit) Order.

No person shall drive a vehicle upon any road within the boundaries of the Bukene Minor Settlement at a speed exceeding thirty miles per hour: Provided that nothing in this Order shall be deemed to affect the provisions of rule 60 of the Traffic Rules relating to the maximum speed at which public service vehicles and commercial vehicles may be driven.
Any person who commits a breach of any of the provisions of this Order shall be liable on conviction to a fine of five hundred shillings or to imprisonment for two months.

The Order relating to Speed Limit shall apply in respect of the town specified in the Schedule hereinbelow. Schedule 1. Babati 2. Bukoba 3. Sanya Juu 4. Korogwe Township 5. Mombo Minor Settlement 6. Tukuyu.
